name: Red-Potato Salad in Sour Cream Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1 Green bell pepper, cored, seeded and finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in boiling salted water for 20 to 25 minutes, or until just tender. Drain and allow to cool.
2. When cool enough to handle, cut the potatoes in half if they are large. Place them in a salad bowl.
3. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoons of vinegar and 4 tablespoons of oil. Toss lightly and set aside.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining vinegar, oil, sour cream, and mayonnaise. Add Dijon mustard and garlic, then whisk until smooth. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Add the green bell pepper, scallions, gherkins, and pimentos to the potatoes. Toss gently.
6. Refrigerate for 2 to 4 hours before serving. When ready to serve, return to room temperature and adjust seasoning as needed. Serves 6.
